author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--init-blocked-lint
content:
Result: Implemented both changes:

1. global.md - Added 'Blocked Actions' subsection under Priority 1: Security documenting permanently blocked git commands (push/merge/rebase/reset/etc.), gated commands (commit requires active issue), and always-allowed read-only commands.

2. kickoff.md - Three additions:
   a. Blocked actions context block in the agent prompt (alongside worktree awareness)
   b. Step 8b: lint/format check instructions with per-language examples (cargo clippy/fmt, eslint, ruff, go vet/gofmt)
   c. Self-review checklist: added lint/formatter pass item

All 146 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.
